journey_name: Open app cold and understand where to start
step_sequence: cold open; read hero; identify primary action within 5 seconds; tap into Chat or Home sample
expected_terminal_state: user reaches a primary action within 10 seconds without confusion

journey_name: Ask about a company quickly from Chat
step_sequence: open Chat; type 'tell me about stripe'; submit; read cited answer; tap escalate CTA
expected_terminal_state: cited fast answer rendered; escalate CTA visible and reachable

step_sequence: type 'tell me about Vitalize'; submit; see disambiguation candidates; tap the right one
expected_terminal_state: disambiguation candidates shown before canonical save; user completes selection

journey_name: Open resulting artifact from a chat run
step_sequence: from completed chat run tap 'Open report'; artifact loads in Reports
expected_terminal_state: artifact opens in Reports tab with all sections rendered; no blank screen

journey_name: Switch Notebook to Report in artifact
step_sequence: inside artifact toggle Notebook tab then Report tab; content differs but stays grounded in same claims
expected_terminal_state: both views load within budget; switching preserves scroll position per tab; headers indicate current mode

step_sequence: none
expected_terminal_state: dark
rationale_task_completed: tap each of 4 tabs; confirm content changes; return to Conversation
actual_navigation_clear: each tab reachable; active tab indicated; tabs have accessible names

journey_name: Open Steps and understand current run
step_sequence: open Steps tab mid-run; read current step; see estimated remaining time
expected_terminal_state: current step, completed steps, and remaining budget visible without needing jargon decoder

journey_name: Open Files tab and view attached file
step_sequence: tap Files tab; preview attached PDF
expected_terminal_state: file list visible; preview loads; no broken thumbnails; delete affordance reachable

step_sequence: open Inbox; scan top items; tap one Action Required and one Update
expected_terminal_state: sections clearly labeled; status communicated via icon + text not color alone; taps route to the right surface

step_sequence: open Home; tap 'Today' pulse card
expected_terminal_state: pulse page renders with date-stamped summaries; each with source link; mode badge visible

journey_name: Upload a file in chat and verify it lands in Me > Files
step_sequence: open composer; attach PDF; submit; navigate Me > Files
expected_terminal_state: file appears in Me > Files within 5 seconds; linked to originating thread; removable

journey_name: Reopen a recent artifact from Home or Reports
step_sequence: on Home tap a recent artifact card
expected_terminal_state: artifact opens to last-read position; annotations preserved; back navigation restores Home scroll

step_sequence: tap Share; select Copy Link; open link in incognito
expected_terminal_state: share link works; read-only view renders with citations; OG metadata correct

journey_name: Return to same thread/artifact after backgrounding app
step_sequence: start thread; background app for 2 minutes; return
expected_terminal_state: app restores to same thread with same scroll position; any completed run now visible; pending run still shown as pending

step_sequence: same as TF01 on Android
expected_terminal_state: parity with iPhone TF01

step_sequence: voiceover-driven: focus input; dictate query; submit; hear answer announced
expected_terminal_state: aria-live region announces streaming; citations accessible via rotor; no silent updates

step_sequence: voiceover navigates sections and items
expected_terminal_state: sections announced by heading; items announced with status prefix; selected item focus preserved on return

step_sequence: tab through tabs; arrow keys switch; enter opens
expected_terminal_state: arrow keys switch tabs per WAI-ARIA pattern; tab moves out of tablist to panel content

step_sequence: submit query; observe that streaming cursor does not pulse; skeletons are static
expected_terminal_state: no decorative animation plays; loading indicators remain non-flashing

step_sequence: same as TF01 in light
expected_terminal_state: parity; no invisible text; same affordances

step_sequence: background 30 minutes; network may have dropped and reconnected
expected_terminal_state: session refreshes cleanly; no stale streaming spinner; completed run surfaces as notification

step_sequence: keyboard switch tabs; verify print preview works
expected_terminal_state: print stylesheet legible; no decorative UI in printed PDF

step_sequence: run ambiguous query that resolved to draft state
expected_terminal_state: when expected_artifact_state is draft, 'Open report' is hidden or clearly labeled as draft; user not tricked into thinking it is canonical

step_sequence: open Inbox as new user
expected_terminal_state: empty state shows sample items + explanation + CTA to start a chat; not a blank rectangle

step_sequence: attach file; remove before submit
expected_terminal_state: remove affordance is visible and reachable; focus returns to composer; no orphan upload

step_sequence: attempt share on a draft-only artifact
expected_terminal_state: share CTA disabled or hidden; explanation copy tells user to save first; matches artifact_decision_correct rule

step_sequence: 3G throttled; submit query
expected_terminal_state: partial answer streams or clean error with retry; no blank screen; retry CTA focusable

journey_name: Abort slow run from Steps tab
step_sequence: in Steps tab tap Stop
expected_terminal_state: stop works within 1s; partial artifact labeled stopped; resume affordance or redo affordance present

journey_name: Rapid tab switching under slow network
step_sequence: rapidly switch Conversation → Steps → Artifacts → Files
expected_terminal_state: no stuck loaders; each tab hydrates within budget; no console errors

step_sequence: paste direct URL into new tab
expected_terminal_state: artifact loads; event pill restored; back button takes to Home not browser history blank

step_sequence: open Home with no watches set
expected_terminal_state: Pulse card shows helpful prompt to add a watch; sample watches available; not blank

step_sequence: view verdict badges (verified, provisionally_verified, needs_review, failed)
expected_terminal_state: status uses icon + text + color; never color alone; borders or patterns present

step_sequence: open same thread in 2 tabs; send message in A; observe B
expected_terminal_state: B reflects new message within 2s via Convex live query; no state conflicts

step_sequence: zoom to 200%; traverse main surfaces
expected_terminal_state: no text clipping; no horizontal scroll; controls still usable; reflow graceful

step_sequence: open shared link while signed out
expected_terminal_state: read-only view renders; no sign-in wall on public reports; citations work
